name: silicon-crew
description: Gated SoC front-end and physical-design toolkit with pipeline orchestration, RTL verification/synthesis/OpenROAD roles, integration, register generation, CRG design, and MCP-backed EDA execution.

interface.shortDescription: SoC RTL, verification, synthesis, OpenROAD, CRG, integration, and register-generation tools.
interface.longDescription: Silicon Crew provides a validated doc-to-RTL pipeline, MCP-only lint/simulation/synthesis/OpenROAD execution, top integration, clock/reset design tools, and YAML/Excel register generation.
defaultPrompt: Create a SoC RTL project skeleton.
Integrate these RTL modules into a top level.
Prepare this SoC top for OpenROAD-flow-scripts.
Generate registers from this YAML spec.
